prompt: A dramatic cinematic sports poster of Neymar Jr seen from behind wearing the Brazil national team home jersey, bright yellow with green trim, the name NEYMAR JR across the shoulders and the number 10 large on the back. The player is turned slightly left, raising one hand to his forehead in a salute while looking toward a blazing horizon, with short curly hair in a faded mohawk style, visible neck and arm tattoos, and multiple ear piercings. Show the Brazil federation crest on the sleeve. The background is a glowing golden sky with dramatic storm clouds, intense sunlight, and huge luminous geometric numerals forming “10” behind him like monumental light structures. Use a rich gold and amber color palette, high contrast, rim lighting, volumetric glow, sharp fabric texture, heroic composition, and premium poster design. At the bottom, add large metallic gold serif title text reading NEYMAR JR, with smaller gold text beneath reading “2026” and “COPA DO MUNDO”, centered like an epic World Cup announcement poster.
